$comment: CEP <-> UXP tab parity ledger (RESEARCH_FEATURE_PLAN_2026-05-25 Q5).

export.justification: Legacy multi-platform export wizard. Superseded in UXP by 'deliverables' which folds OTIO + AAF + IMF + Dolby Vision planning into one tab. CEP 'export' tab will be retired with CEP at ~2026-09; do not invest further. F252 migration consideration.

nlp.justification: Legacy natural-language command tab. The F143 chat-conductor RFC (AGENT_UX_RFC.md) replaces this with a side-panel '/agent/chat' surface that ships first in UXP (F143/F252 sequencing). CEP 'nlp' tab will be retired with CEP at ~2026-09.

search.justification: UXP got the FTS5 transcript-index search surface as a dedicated tab; CEP keeps the same backend via the 'nlp' command palette. After CEP EOL the UXP 'search' tab becomes the canonical surface.

deliverables.justification: UXP-first replacement for CEP 'export'. Hosts OTIO/AAF/FCPXML interchange, IMF/Dolby Vision/ADM BW64 planning presets (F245-F248), VFX sheets, ADR, music cues, asset inventories.
deliverables.cep_equivalent: export tab + Timeline -> Export menu items

$policy: When a new tab is added to either panel, update this file AND tests/test_panel_tab_parity.py. The test fails CI on un-annotated divergence.
